## Type

- [ ] New agent / skill
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] JSON manifests parse (`plugin.json`, `marketplace.json`)
- [ ] New agents/skills have `name` + `description` frontmatter
- [ ] Markdown passes `markdownlint-cli2`
- [ ] No secrets or local machine paths committed
- [ ] Cross-references (`/skill-name`, agent handoffs) updated if anything was renamed
